accepted_findings.reason: shell is gated by resolve_command(); use_shell is True only for Windows .cmd/.bat shims. argv is a list for .exe spawns.

accepted_findings.message_regex: Starting a process with a shell
accepted_findings.reason: clear_screen() runs a fixed CLEAR_CMD constant for terminal animation; no user-controlled input.
Windows-only fallback to launch a visible console via start/cmd; bounded developer UX path, not generic remote input.
Executer agent intentionally runs LLM/user-authored scripts; shell=True is part of the documented execution surface (mitigate via deployment trust model).
execute_command / decompile_java / open-image helpers intentionally invoke shell commands on operator-requested paths; core Multi-Turn tool behavior.
Documentation examples describing local ws:// architecture; not executable client code.
Defaults ws_url from localhost http base (127.0.0.1:8000); local bridge deployment. Production TLS should set explicit wss:// in config.
MCP system metrics server binds 127.0.0.1 by default; ws:// log line reflects local-only service.
Project requires Python 3.12+ (see requirements/CLAUDE.md); Popen errors= is supported.
Project requires Python 3.12+; Popen encoding= is supported.
Developer-only PyInstaller build scripts; not shipped runtime attack surface.
_resolve_rule_block edits static prompt.pmt sentinel markers (ACPX/Templates gates); does not concatenate raw chat user input into prompts.
Executer is designed to run operator/LLM-directed scripts; taint is intentional product behavior.
Intentional shell invocation for script execution, jd-cli .bat on Windows, and desktop UX helpers.
